Blankiet We arrived and had nice conversation with Claude about the current vintage. Both he and Denis Malbec (winemaker) are quite happy with their fruit and feel good about where there are in the process. They are both very excited about the...

posts.name: Robert Dentice
posts.cooked:
Here is what I wrote on the Vinous Board:

For me this is the most exciting project in all of the U.S. let alone Napa. I was the first to write about MacDonald and probably Sandlands and this would be my third third in that trilogy of important can’t miss new projects. If you like old school Napa cabs I highly recommend that you sign up for the first offering. You will be very happy down the road just like all those that were early on MacDonald and Sandlands.

Full disclosure I consider Ketan a friend.

posts.name: Robert Dentice
posts.cooked:
I think you can see this without a subscription:

vinous.com

Vinous | Explore All Things Wine

At the intersection of media and technology, Vinous is Antonio Galloni's vision of a modern-day wine publication.

posts.name: Anton Dotson
posts.cooked:
I really appreciate what he has done and look forward to supporting such an endeavor.

I signed up!

I am a little jealous…it seems a great accomplishment!

posts.name: Robert Dentice
posts.cooked:
Anton D:

I really appreciate what he has done and look forward to supporting such an endeavor.

I signed up!

posts.name: Robert Dentice
posts.cooked:
In case anyone needs it here is a link to the website:

Beta Jasud

Beta Jasud

Beta Wines and Jasud Estate are two Cabernet Sauvignon focused projects by winemaker and grape-grower Ketan Mody. Their home is Diamond Mountain in Calistoga.

posts.name: Christina Siun O Connell
posts.cooked: Enjoyed the video - really interesting to hear about the steps involved. Thanks!

posts.name: Richard Frankel
posts.cooked:
Definitely interesting stuff. It is an amazing commitment of time from idea to first bottles - nearly 20 years!

These first releases that come out later this month are from the Monticello vineyard in Sonoma. If I understand it correctly, this is not the Diamond Mountain vineyard Ketan showed in the Kelli White video. We’ll have to wait to try that until the 2020 or 201 vintage .

posts.name: Ian Dorin
posts.cooked:
Super excited for this to finally hit.
Any ideas on pricing?

posts.name: Jörgen Lindström Carlvik
posts.cooked:
Ian Dorin:

Super excited for this to finally hit.
Any ideas on pricing?

Unless changes have been made, it’s USD85.

posts.name: Andrew Demaree
posts.cooked: That sounds great. Looking forward to the offer, as some of my old favorites appear to be moving north of my comfort zone at this point.

posts.name: Rich Brown
posts.cooked:
Cool story and love that price point as well. Thinking I’ll have to try a couple of the 12’s.

Appreciate the heads up on this one!

posts.name: Jörgen Lindström Carlvik
posts.cooked: …and now all sold out. Congrats Ketan.
